scene_title: Mao colossal de demonio sobre cidade em grade
narrative_beat: Controle total de mao carmesim e ouro escuro

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid colossal medieval demon hand in crimson and dark gold scales with enormous fingers descending from sky grasping entire city as metaphor for total control in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the enormous demon hand descending to grasp the entire city
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated aerial city grid in prison pattern grey streets from above in background
props: colossal demon hand in crimson and dark gold

composition.foreground: demon hand in vivid crimson dark gold

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson-dark gold saturation

mood.emotion: Revelation 13:16-17 — the mark system of total economic control

symbolism.primary: the grasping hand as the CBDC and social credit infrastructure
symbolism.secondary: city grid as prison bars already in place beneath the modern surface

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
